message:
test(conformance): add unistd_ops conformance test harness

Add dedicated conformance test suite for unistd_ops.json fixture:

- unistd_ops_conformance_test.rs (13 tests): validates unistd.h syscall
  wrappers covering process identity (getpid/getppid), user identity
  (getuid/getgid/geteuid/getegid), file ops (read/write/close/lseek),
  filesystem (getcwd/access), terminal (isatty), and pipe operations

Includes coverage validation for error paths (ENOENT, EBADF) and
POSIX spec references.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
